selection_scope: Non-exhaustive diverse sample of Ubuntu 24.04 repository software that uses giflib at runtime or build time.
method: Selected runtime dependents from Ubuntu package metadata with apt-cache rdepends libgif7.
Selected compile-time dependents from source package metadata with apt-cache showsrc ... Build-Depends: libgif-dev.
Summarized runtime functionality from package descriptions, source package metadata, and package file lists.

dependents.name: giflib-tools
dependents.runtime_functionality: The package is itself a set of GIF-oriented command-line tools for building, repairing, inspecting, and converting GIF files.
evidence: Installs gif2rgb, gifbuild, gifclrmp, giffix, giftext, and giftool.

dependents.name: webp
dependents.runtime_functionality: Uses giflib for GIF input support in the WebP tool set, most explicitly for the gif2webp converter that turns GIF animations or still GIF images into WebP.

dependents.name: fbi
dependents.runtime_functionality: Displays GIF images directly on Linux framebuffer devices.
evidence: Package description says it is a framebuffer image viewer with built-in support for common image file formats.

dependents.name: mtpaint
dependents.runtime_functionality: Opens and edits GIF images; the Ubuntu package description explicitly lists GIF among the handled formats.
evidence: Package description: it can handle JPEG, GIF, TIFF, BMP, XPM, and XBM files.

dependents.name: tracker-extract
dependents.runtime_functionality: Reads GIF files during desktop indexing so Tracker can extract metadata and image properties for search.
evidence: tracker-miners source package Build-Depends on libgif-dev.

dependents.name: libextractor-plugin-gif
dependents.runtime_functionality: Extracts metadata from GIF files for applications that use GNU libextractor.
evidence: Package description explicitly says it is the GIF plugin.

dependents.name: libcamlimages-ocaml
dependents.runtime_functionality: Lets OCaml programs load, save, display, and translate GIF images through CamlImages.
evidence: Package description says the library provides image processing plus loading and saving of various image formats.

dependents.name: libgdal34t64
dependents.runtime_functionality: Provides GIF raster format handling inside GDAL-based GIS applications and format-conversion workflows.
evidence: gdal source package Build-Depends on libgif-dev.

dependents.name: gdal
dependents.runtime_functionality: Builds GIF raster support into libgdal34t64, gdal-bin, gdal-plugins, and python3-gdal.
evidence: Produces libgdal34t64, libgdal-dev, gdal-bin, gdal-data, gdal-plugins, and python3-gdal.

dependents.name: exactimage
dependents.runtime_functionality: Builds GIF decoding and encoding support into the ExactImage utilities and its Perl and Python bindings.

dependents.name: sail
dependents.runtime_functionality: Builds the GIF codec shipped in sail-codecs for image decoding and encoding.

dependents.name: libwebp
dependents.runtime_functionality: Builds GIF input support into the WebP tool set, especially the gif2webp converter.
evidence: Produces the webp binary package, which installs /usr/bin/gif2webp.

dependents.name: imlib2
dependents.runtime_functionality: Builds GIF image loading and saving support into Imlib2, which downstream viewers and desktop tools use for GIF handling.
